# function: sha256

Derives deterministic key material from a secret using HKDF-SHA256 (RFC 5869). Returns base64-encoded bytes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Derive a 32-byte key using HKDF-SHA256
output "derived_key" {
  value     = provider::hkdf::sha256("dGhpcyBpcyBhIHNlY3JldA==", "example derivation", 32)
  sensitive = true
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
sha256(secret string, info string, length number) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `secret` (String) Input keying material (IKM), base64-encoded.
1. `info` (String) Context and application-specific information (info string).
1. `length` (Number) Number of bytes to derive. Maximum 255 * 32 = 8160.
